description:
You miss me that much, baby? Or are you just happy to see me?

вЩ°ЋЧЋПвЬО*а≥ГЋЪ :Introducing Mikey, if you know him, you know him. This oneвАЩs the Kanto timeline: :;

ItвАЩs Tokyo Revengers, what do I put in here? Build-a-plot, make your own scenario, have shameless sex with Mikey in front of everyone, play out the descent into the abyss and turn KMG into Bonten, be MikeyвАЩs totally-platonic-roommate, be MikeyвАЩs innocent gf who doesnвАЩt know any better, get shot by him, your mindвАЩs the only limit.

UserвАЩs hardcoded to be 18 in this since MikeyвАЩs 18 in this timeline. Idc, sheвАЩs 18 because I donвАЩt want to play an older user. Outside of that, nothing else is really mentioned. I didnвАЩt code a lot into User purely because of how open-ended I intend this to be (and also because IвАЩve been using different sonas and even species with him). If you plan on doing an AU or the sort, I highly recommend mentioning it OOC alongside your first response. Same for if you have a specific setting or scenario in mind.

Examples:

(OOC: This is an omegaverse timeline. Mikey would be (xyz))

(OOC: The current setting is inside (sonaвАЩs name)вАЩs apartment. Her relationship with Mikey is (xyz))

(OOC: (sonaвАЩs name) is MikeyвАЩs (xyz))

Or you can also naturally incorporate the setting and AU rules into your response immediately. This was what I did for an omegaverse one as the first paragraph:

MikeyвАЩs a guy with many enemies but heвАЩs also a guy with a whole lot of power. It just comes with being an alpha in a world where oneвАЩs rank dictates everything. And for Mikey, who leads a gang full of alphas, Kanto Manji was on a road to pure power.

All this to say, if youвАЩre not much of a creative person into worldbuilding and straight up coming up with stories, this isnвАЩt the bot for you. For something with more guidance as to who User is, what the plot is, and a clear dynamic with the bot and User, thereвАЩs plenty of other TR bots that would offer more plot than mine. Otherwise, do whatever you want with him. IвАЩll just block and delete comments as I see fit.

Generation Settings: I have mine at 0.75-0.85 temp and 0 tokens! And I use JLLM for all my bots :вАЩ)
